verses.text: If they return to God in exile, He will gather them again. Return. Mercy follows repentance.
If they return to God in exile, He will gather them again. Return. Mercy follows repentance.
If they return to God in exile, He will gather them again. Return. Mercy follows repentance.
He will circumcise their heart to love Him. New heart. God works the love He requires.
He will circumcise their heart to love Him. New heart. God works the love He requires.
He will circumcise their heart to love Him. New heart. God works the love He requires.
He will bless them again if they obey with all their heart. Restored. Obedience brings renewed blessing.
He will bless them again if they obey with all their heart. Restored. Obedience brings renewed blessing.
He will bless them again if they obey with all their heart. Restored. Obedience brings renewed blessing.
He will bless them again if they obey with all their heart. Restored. Obedience brings renewed blessing.
The commandment is not hidden, but near, in your mouth and heart. Near. God's word is within reach.
The commandment is not hidden, but near, in your mouth and heart. Near. God's word is within reach.
The commandment is not hidden, but near, in your mouth and heart. Near. God's word is within reach.
The commandment is not hidden, but near, in your mouth and heart. Near. God's word is within reach.
'I have set before thee... life and good, and death and evil.' The choice. Life lies in loving God.
'I have set before thee... life and good, and death and evil.' The choice. Life lies in loving God.
If your heart turns away, you shall surely perish. Warning. Turning from God is death.
If your heart turns away, you shall surely perish. Warning. Turning from God is death.
'Therefore choose life, that... thou mayest live.' Choose life. God Himself is your life.
'Therefore choose life, that... thou mayest live.' Choose life. God Himself is your life.
